nodes.label: Bookstore Aesthetic
nodes.rationale: Both domains share a single visual identity inspired by the warmth of a well-loved bookstore: amber tones, organic warmth, tactile typography, calm structure. Gym domain inherits same literary warmth, no sporty treatment.

nodes.label: Domain Adaptations Biblioteca Gimnasio
nodes.rationale: Visual system is identical for both domains. Only differences are section icons, empty state illustrations, and entity terms. Never change colors, fonts, border-radius, or layout based on domain.

nodes.label: Video Upload to Supabase
nodes.rationale: Video uploaded to Supabase Storage before exercise creation. Architecture uses Onion layers: UI/Composable/Application/Domain/Infrastructure. Decouples video upload from exercise creation for separation of concerns.

nodes.label: Gom Jabbar Three Stage Modal Architecture
nodes.rationale: Three modals map to stages of knowledge: Hall of Verification (ConfirmModal), Hall of Acclaim (SuccessModal), Hall of Errors (ErrorModal). Each modal serves a distinct purpose in the upload flow.
nodes.norm_label: gom jabbar three stage modal architecture

nodes.label: Stillsuit Graceful Degradation
nodes.rationale: If Supabase config fails, system does not collapse. try/catch sets composable to null, form falls back to creating exercise without video. User sees no error — system adapts like Fremen stillsuit recycling moisture.

nodes.label: Janitor Gate Validation System
nodes.rationale: Three validation gates before form submission: name (required/2-100 chars/must contain letter), difficulty (must be enum), video (optional but validated if present). Like gatekeeper inspecting gladiator before arena.

nodes.label: Pinia Store ID Collision Fix
nodes.rationale: Two stores used same ID 'equipment'. JS store had equipmentList, TS store had equipments. Navigation order determined which won, causing undefined.length crash. Fixed by renaming TS store ID to 'maintenance-equipment'.
